user_input: 低光照环境下的行人检测，希望兼顾速度和精度
clarification_questions: 输入只有普通 RGB，还是也有红外/多光谱数据？
目标是边缘实时部署还是服务器端实时处理？

candidate_families: multispectral detector only if infrared exists
baseline_expectation.preferred_role: A real-time pedestrian detector with a low-light evaluation split.

hypothesis: Low illumination reduces pedestrian contrast and shifts feature statistics; one lightweight feature-level adaptation or controlled enhancement should improve night recall without making preprocessing latency dominate.

alternatives: multispectral fusion if infrared is available
tailoring_advice.recommended_stitch: Benchmark detector-only, enhancement-plus-detector, and feature-adaptation alternatives; select one based on end-to-end latency and night-specific recall.
reject: reporting detector latency while excluding enhancement

experiment_plan: E2 enhancement pipeline or feature adaptation
report miss rate/recall, false positives, end-to-end latency and energy
stop_conditions: Stop if enhancement improves perceptual quality but harms detection.
Revise if day/night split is confounded by scene identity.
No-go for real-time claim excluding preprocessing.

user_input: 我想做一个基于摄像头的人体动作识别系统
clarification_questions: 你只需要识别动作类别，还是还要判断动作质量和错误阶段？
输入是单人固定机位，还是多人/移动机位？

baseline_expectation.preferred_role: A reproducible RGB or skeleton action-recognition baseline matched to scene complexity.

hypothesis: When actions share similar poses but differ in temporal order, frame-level classification fails; phase-aware temporal modeling should improve subject-independent recognition, and quality scoring must be evaluated as a separate task.

alternatives: RGB baseline when pose extraction is unreliable
rule-based quality metrics as an interpretable baseline
tailoring_advice.recommended_stitch: Clarify recognition versus quality assessment; for a simple single-person system, freeze a skeleton baseline and add one temporal/phase module before any feedback head.
reject: mixing action recognition accuracy with coaching-quality claims

experiment_plan: optional E2 quality head only with labeled errors
report accuracy/F1, phase errors, pose failures, end-to-end FPS
stop_conditions: Stop quality claims without quality labels.
No-go for generalization claims from random frame-level split.

user_input: 面向移动端的轻量化手势识别
clarification_questions: 手势是静态手势还是连续动态手势？
输入来自手机摄像头、IMU，还是两者结合？

candidate_families: lightweight temporal model for dynamic gestures
baseline_expectation.preferred_role: A small image or temporal model matched to modality and gesture type.

candidate_families: tiny transformer only for dynamic gestures

hypothesis: For mobile gestures, background and user variation dominate raw-frame classification; normalized hand representation plus the smallest task-appropriate temporal model should improve user-independent accuracy within mobile latency.

alternatives: IMU fusion when camera privacy or low light is problematic
tailoring_advice.recommended_stitch: Use keypoint/image normalization before adding a complex backbone; static and dynamic gestures require different baselines and must not be merged prematurely.
reject: using a temporal module for static gestures
reporting desktop GPU FPS as mobile performance

experiment_plan: E2 temporal module only if dynamic
report accuracy, confusion, cold-start latency, sustained device FPS and memory
stop_conditions: Revise if gesture definitions are not separable.
No-go for on-device claim without actual device or faithful emulator evidence.

user_input: 多模态医学影像融合分类
clarification_questions: 计划融合哪些模态，例如 CT、MRI、PET 或临床表格？
训练和测试时是否保证每个患者都具备全部模态？

baseline_expectation.preferred_role: A unimodal and simple late-fusion baseline before cross-modal architecture.

parallel_expectations.mechanism: avoid failure when a modality is absent

hypothesis: When paired modalities contain complementary but unevenly reliable evidence, fixed concatenation is brittle; gated fusion should improve classification while modality dropout preserves performance under missing inputs.

alternatives: late fusion when data is small
decision-level fusion when registration is unreliable
tailoring_advice.recommended_stitch: Prove complementarity with unimodal and late-fusion baselines first; add one gated/cross-modal fusion module, then missing-modality training only if the real workflow requires it.
reject: claiming multimodal benefit without unimodal controls

experiment_plan: report AUC/F1 plus performance by modality availability
stop_conditions: Stop if fusion gain disappears against tuned late fusion.
Revise if modalities are not reliably paired.
No-go for clinical benefit claims without external validation.

user_input: 中文长文本分类模型优化
clarification_questions: 文本通常有多长，是否明显超过当前模型上下文窗口？
分类依赖全局结构，还是少数关键段落即可判断？

baseline_expectation.preferred_role: A strong Chinese pretrained encoder with truncation and hierarchical baselines.

hypothesis: If labels depend on evidence distributed beyond the truncation window, hierarchical or sparse aggregation should outperform matched chunk/truncation baselines without unacceptable latency.

tailoring_advice.recommended_stitch: Measure whether truncation actually loses label evidence; start with hierarchical chunk encoding, then consider sparse attention only when cross-chunk interaction is necessary.
reject: assuming longer context is always better
comparing models with different token budgets

experiment_plan: length-bucket accuracy, macro-F1, latency and memory
stop_conditions: Stop if short-text subset accounts for all gains.
Revise if labels are determined by one local section.
No-go for efficiency claims without matched token budget.
